turns.user_message: I tried to cheer myself up today, but it didn't really work. I just ended up feeling lonely anyway.
I keep trying to shake this feeling, but it's always there. It's like I'm just going through the motions with everyone.
I feel completely disconnected from the people who are supposed to be closest to me. It's like I'm watching my own life from the outside.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better.
